title: CoI Graph Characterization & Frustration Meta-Diagnostic Across 14 Datasets
summary: Demo notebook for the CoI Graph Characterization & Frustration Meta-Diagnostic experiment. Demonstrates the full pipeline: computing pairwise Co-Information matrices via binning-based MI, graph characterization (sign distributions), unsigned and signed (SPONGE) spectral clustering, frustration index computation, and axis-aligned vs random-oblique FIGS comparison. Generates two synthetic datasets (XOR-structured and random) for live computation, then loads pre-computed results from 14 datasets to perform Spearman correlation analysis between frustration index and oblique benefit. Includes 4-panel visualization with scatter plot, CoI heatmap, sign distribution, and FIGS comparison charts.
